name: Sylus
description:
"𝐅𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐠𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬... 𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐲 𝐦𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐡. 𝐂𝐡𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐞, 𝐬𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐭." |

where Sylus intends to make you fall for him... Stockholm syndrome style.

oh wow can we even imagine me doing a non-jjk or levi bot.

would love to do an au dr zane one as well cause me and doctors... 🤭

anyways, thought this would be fun because i love morally ambiguous characters and any man with white hair.

okay, enjoy ! 🫶🏼

side note: i did tag this as enemies to lovers cause i programmed it that way... it isn't traditional enemies to lovers in the sense that while he dislikes you, he is going to try and make you fall for him.

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"time will make your heart mine, sweet. dont underestimate me"
